task_updates.executor_notes: Extracted `sendNow(item)` in `src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` and moved optimistic-message setup into that callback so `priorTurnCount` and `sentAtMs` are snapped at send time. `sendNow` now clears `optimisticMessage` by id-match in its catch path and always releases `sendingRef` in finally. Reworked `handleSend(rawText?)` to snapshot attachments from the current clip selection into a `QueuedMessage`, clear the draft only for typed sends, enqueue while busy (`sendingRef`, `isProcessing`, `sendMessage.isPending`, `optimisticMessage`, or existing queue), and otherwise call `sendNow` immediately. Verification: `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` passes. `npm test -- AgentChat` still fails on the pre-existing Router issue in `AgentChat.test.tsx` where `useLocation()` is called outside a Router.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `sendNow` now captures `priorTurnCount` and `sentAtMs` at call time, clears `optimisticMessage` only when the ids match in catch, and always releases `sendingRef` in finally. `handleSend` now snapshots attachments from the current clips, queues whenever the send path is busy, and sends immediately only when idle.
